revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Mbox| | class = <includeonly>noprint</includeonly> | image = none | textstyle = text-align:center; margin:1em .5em; | text = {{flatlist| *[[Wikipedia:About|About Wikipedia]] **[[Wikipedia:Administration|Administration]] **[[Wikipedia:FAQ|FAQ]] * [[Wikipedia:Contributing to Wikipedia|Contributing]] **[[Wikipedia:Tips|Tips]] **[[Wikipedia:Task Center|Tasks]] **[[Help:Introduction|Tutorial]] * [[Help:Menu|Help menu]] * [[Wikipedia:Directories and indexes|Directories]] * [[Help:Cheatsheet|Cheatsheet]] * [[Wikipedia:Questions|Asking questions]] **[[Wikipedia:Help desk|Help desk]] **[[Wikipedia:Reference desk|Reference desk]] **[[Wikipedia:Teahouse|Teahouse]] }} }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Help_pages_header here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
